markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, SEO performance, and future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Airbyte will shift marketing focus from its "core" product to the new "agentic" AI product to accelerate its growth from 0-to-1.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:** A fixed weekly schedule for content delivery and review will be established to improve team efficiency and readiness for sync calls.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**SEO Performance:** A 60-day decline in LLM referral traffic is a seasonal trend across clients; the team will investigate page-level patterns and potential attribution issues.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [**Post-Sprint Scope:** The team will define the post-strategy-sprint scope and budget, with a focus on the new AI product.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Pivot to AI Product

  - [**Rationale:** The "core" product is self-sustaining organically, so the company is shifting resources to accelerate the new AI product's growth.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
      - [**Goal:** Increase team focus on the AI product from \~30% to \>50-60% by EOY/next 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
      - [**Marketing Impact:** A major rebrand and repositioning toward AI is planned for the next quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** The new AI product will become the primary focus for content and experimentation.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
      - [**Core Product:** Efforts will be put on "autopilot," focusing only on high-impact initiatives (the "top 10% for 80% return").](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**New Product:** The PSEO workflow will target AI developers, similar to the "Augment" client strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Content Production & Workflow

  - [**Strategy Sprint Status (Week 5):**](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [**Articles:** 2 articles awaiting images for publication; 3 more in production.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [**Thought Leadership:** The first draft is a "calibration article." The next priority is "Nine Layers of Agentic Infrastructure."](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
      - [**Product Deep Dive:** A session with Michelle is scheduled for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [**Workflow Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [**Problem:** The current ad-hoc content delivery schedule creates review bottlenecks and leaves the Airbyte team unprepared for sync calls.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**Solution:** Establish a fixed weekly cadence for content delivery and review.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**Technical Details:**](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [**URL Slugs:** Use primary keywords, not full article titles, to improve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [**TLDR Pages:** Joe is working with engineering to automate updates using the existing refresh pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### SEO Performance & Analysis

  - [**Weekly Output:** 36 pages published (30 PSEO, 6 editorial).](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**LLM Referral Traffic Decline:**](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [**Observation:** A 60-day decline in LLM referrals (e.g., ChatGPT) started mid-October.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [**Context:** This is a seasonal trend observed across \~12 GrowthX clients.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [**Engagement:** User engagement on LLM-referred pages remains steady, indicating traffic quality is not an issue.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**Analysis Plan (Jakub):**](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [**Page-Level:** Identify patterns in which page types (e.g., blog, homepage) are affected.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [**Platform-Level:** Investigate any recent changes to how LLMs surface results.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
      - [**Attribution:** Rule out tracking issues by checking for a rise in "no source" traffic in GA.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Competitive Presence:** Grew \>5% in November, indicating strong progress.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

### Post-Sprint Planning

  - [**Proposed Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [**PSEO:** 30 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [**Editorial:** \~5 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [**Thought Leadership:** Continue as a dedicated workstream](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [**Tracking:** New Scrunch prompts will be created for the AI product content.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Tag prompts to create a filterable view for AI-specific data.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Constraint:** No known limit on the number of prompts in Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [Send featured images for the first two articles to Tanmay.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [Share the three articles in production upon completion.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [Schedule the Product Deep Dive with Michelle (via Carol) and loop in Digg.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
      - [Propose a fixed weekly content delivery/review schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Provide post-sprint scope and budget options next week.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [**Mario & Tanmay:**](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
      - [Prioritize the next batch of Thought Leadership topics.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [Meet Monday to define the PSEO strategy for the new AI product.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [**Joe (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [Implement the "primary keyword" URL slug rule for all new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/TPepozvAwZyo9FdrKaCizqnGD_SE8Lgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
